title: vaccinium cereum
intro: Vaccinium cereum, also known as the sticky blueberry or sticky bilberry, is a type of low-growing, shrub-like plant in the heath family (Ericaceae). This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its berries, which contain anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Vaccinium cereum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Vaccinium cereum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also consumed fresh or dried as a dietary supplement.
